title: Best Dental Clinic in New Delhi, Dentist in Delhi, Dental Clinic South Delhi, 32 Smile Stone Dental Clinic

Prior to this she received her BDS degree (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) from MAHE University, Manipal, India. She has been practicing dentistry since 1997 and worked in some top hospitals in New Delhi before starting her own private practice. Dr. Shivani specializes in cosmetic & general dentistry and heads a team of visiting consultants specializing in each branch of dentistry. Together they offer a comprehensive dental treatment for the entire family. She is also a recommended dentist by the American Embassy in New Delhi (American Citizen Services).
